zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hampden於大約1308年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾格亞特 哈普登時，他的父親Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight52歲，母親Nichola de Grenville29歲。他於1329年與Joan d' Alesbury在美國奧克拉荷馬州凱米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hampden was born about 1308, in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, was 52 and his mother, Nichola de Grenville, was 29. He married Joan d' Alesbury in 1329, in Middleton, Kay, Oklahoma, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1375, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hampden est né environ 1308, à Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Nichola de Grenville, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan d' Alesbury en 1329, à Middleton, Kay, Oklahoma, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1375, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hampden um 1308 in Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight 52 und seine Mutter Nichola de Grenville 29. Er hat 1329 in Middleton, Kay, Oklahoma, Vereinigte Staaten Joan d' Alesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hampdenが約1308年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアグレアト ハンプデンで生まれた時，父Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knightは52歳，母Nichola de Grenvilleは29歳であった。1329年にアメリカ合衆国オクラホマ州ケイミッドレトンでJoan d' Alesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hampden(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 벅잉함실르 그리트 함p든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola de Grenville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1329년 미국 오클라호마 주 카이 미들레턴에서 Joan d' Alesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hampden nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Great Hampden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Nichola de Grenville, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan d' Alesbury em 1329, em Middleton, Kay, Oclaoma, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1375, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hampden родился около 1308 г. в местности грит хампден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Nichola de Grenville, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan d' Alesbury в 1329 г. в местности миддлетон, кеи, Оклахома, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1375 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.
